sentence: 这家书店专卖学术出版物。
pinyin: Zhè jiā shūdiàn zhuān mài xuéshù chūbǎnwù.
english: This bookstore specializes in academic publications.

meaning: 1. (of a disease) epidemic; 2. qualities that make sth popular or fash
sentence: 这种病具有很强的流行性。
pinyin: Zhè zhǒng bìng jùyǒu hěn qiáng de liúxíngxìng.
english: This disease has a very strong epidemic nature.

meaning: 1. (coll.) promising; 2. likely to turn out well
sentence: 他面试表现不错，应该有戏。
pinyin: Tā miànshì biǎoxiàn bùcuò, yīnggāi yǒuxì.
english: He did well in the interview; there's a good chance he'll get it.

sentence: 农村里偶尔还能看到驴子。
pinyin: Nóngcūn lǐ ǒu'ěr hái néng kàndào lǘzi.
english: You can still occasionally see donkeys in the countryside.

sentence: 这双鞋穿起来非常贴合脚型。
pinyin: Zhè shuāng xié chuān qǐlái fēicháng tiēhé jiǎoxíng.
english: These shoes fit the shape of your feet very well when you wear them.

sentence: 这是我的私密日记，请勿翻看。
pinyin: Zhè shì wǒ de sīmì rìjì, qǐng wù fānkàn.
english: This is my private diary; please don't read through it.

meaning: 1. to infer; 2. to judge; 3. inference; 4. judgment; 5. conclusion
sentence: 他的论断缺乏足够的证据支持。
pinyin: Tā de lùnduàn quēfá zúgòu de zhèngjù zhīchí.
english: His conclusion lacks sufficient evidence to support it.

meaning: a collection of choice items (poems, photos etc)
sentence: 这本书是历年优秀散文的集锦。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū shì lìnián yōuxiù sǎnwén de jíjǐn.
english: This book is a collection of the best essays from over the years.

sentence: 印度传统社会中，种姓制度影响很深。
pinyin: Yìndù chuántǒng shèhuì zhōng, zhǒngxìng zhìdù yǐngxiǎng hěn shēn.
english: In traditional Indian society, the caste system has had a very deep influence.

sentence: 这篇报道有明显的倾向性，不够客观。
pinyin: Zhè piān bàodào yǒu míngxiǎn de qīngxiàngxìng, bú gòu kèguān.
english: This report has an obvious bias and is not objective enough.

sentence: 这台洗衣机的电动机坏了，需要更换。
pinyin: Zhè tái xǐyījī de diàndòngjī huài le, xūyào gēnghuàn.
english: The electric motor in this washing machine broke and needs to be replaced.

sentence: 这首歌广为流传，大家都会唱。
pinyin: Zhè shǒu gē guǎngwéi liúchuán, dàjiā dōu huì chàng.
english: This song has spread widely and everyone knows how to sing it.

meaning: valve (esp. tire valve); accelerator (obsolete term for 油門|油门); stigma
sentence: 自行车轮胎没气了，检查一下气门。
pinyin: Zìxíngchē lúntāi méi qì le, jiǎnchá yīxià qìmén.
english: The bicycle tire is flat — check the valve.

sentence: 政府为低收入家庭提供住房补贴。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ wèi dī shōurù jiātíng tígōng zhùfáng bǔtiē.
english: The government provides housing subsidies for low-income families.

sentence: 他在大学里读政法专业。
pinyin: Tā zài dàxué lǐ dú zhèngfǎ zhuānyè.
english: He studies politics and law at university.

meaning: to select and edit; to compile
sentence: 老师编选了一批经典短文供学生阅读。
pinyin: Lǎoshī biān xuǎn le yī pī jīngdiǎn duǎnwén gōng xuésheng yuèdú.
english: The teacher compiled a selection of classic short essays for students to read.

sentence: 今年这条铁路的运输量创了新高。
pinyin: Jīnnián zhè tiáo tiělù de yùnshūliàng chuàng le xīn gāo.
english: This railway's freight volume hit a new record this year.

sentence: 这组数据的方差很大，说明数值比较分散。
pinyin: Zhè zǔ shùjù de fāngchā hěn dà, shuōmíng shùzhí bǐjiào fēnsàn.
english: The variance of this data set is large, showing that the values are quite spread out.

sentence: 历史上真正的清官并不多见。
pinyin: Lìshǐ shàng zhēnzhèng de qīngguān bìng bù duōjiàn.
english: Truly honest and upright officials are not common throughout history.

sentence: 宪法属于公法的范畴。
pinyin: Xiànfǎ shǔyú gōngfǎ de fànchóu.
english: Constitutional law falls within the scope of public law.

meaning: running of armed forces; military management; to govern armed forces;
sentence: 这位将领治军严格，士兵们都很守纪律。
pinyin: Zhè wèi jiānglǐng zhì jūn yángé, shìbīngmen dōu hěn shǒu jìlǜ.
english: This general runs a strict military; the soldiers are all very disciplined.

meaning: in numerical terms (typically followed by 不少[bu4 shao3] or 不多[bu4 duo1
sentence: 报名参加的人为数不少。
pinyin: Bàomíng cānjiā de rén wéishù bù shǎo.
english: Quite a few people signed up to participate.

sentence: 他的家乡在美国中西部的一个小镇。
pinyin: Tā de jiāxiāng zài Měiguó zhōngxībù de yī gè xiǎo zhèn.
english: His hometown is a small town in the American Midwest.

sentence: 法院裁定这项法律违宪，必须废除。
pinyin: Fǎyuàn cáidìng zhè xiàng fǎlǜ wéixiàn, bìxū fèichú.
english: The court ruled this law unconstitutional and that it must be abolished.

meaning: "yellow wine" (mulled rice wine, usually served warm)
sentence: 奶奶喜欢做菜时加一点黄酒提味。
pinyin: Nǎinai xǐhuān zuò cài shí jiā yīdiǎn huángjiǔ tí wèi.
english: Grandma likes to add a splash of rice wine when cooking to enhance the flavor.

sentence: 这本书是近代诗歌选编，收录了很多名家作品。
pinyin: Zhè běn shū shì jìndài shīgē xuǎn biān, shōulù le hěn duō míngjiā zuòpǐn.
english: This book is an anthology of modern poetry featuring many renowned authors.

meaning: lower chamber (of legislative body); lower house; the House of Commons
sentence: 英国下议院通过了这项新法案。
pinyin: Yīngguó xià yìyuàn tōngguò le zhè xiàng xīn fǎ'àn.
english: The UK House of Commons passed this new bill.

sentence: 这味草药药性温和，适合老人服用。
pinyin: Zhè wèi cǎoyào yàoxìng wēnhé, shìhé lǎorén fúyòng.
english: This herbal medicine has a mild medicinal effect and is suitable for the elderly.

meaning: affected; artificial; to make; to manufacture
sentence: 他说话太造作了，听起来很假。
pinyin: Tā shuōhuà tài zàozuò le, tīng qǐlái hěn jiǎ.
english: The way he talks is too affected; it sounds very fake.

meaning: principal; main; flagship (product); title (track); to specialize in;
sentence: 这家餐厅主打川菜，口味很正宗。
pinyin: Zhè jiā cāntīng zhǔdǎ chuāncài, kǒuwèi hěn zhèngzōng.
english: This restaurant's main focus is Sichuan cuisine and the flavors are very authentic.

sentence: 山顶上有一座历史悠久的道观。
pinyin: Shāndǐng shàng yǒu yī zuò lìshǐ yōujiǔ de dàoguàn.
english: There is a centuries-old Daoist temple at the top of the mountain.

meaning: the reverse side of sth.; opposite side of a topic
sentence: 纸的反面还有字，别扔掉。
pinyin: Zhǐ de fǎnmiàn hái yǒu zì, bié rēng diào.
english: There's writing on the back of the paper — don't throw it away.

sentence: 这位医生非常敬业，很受尊重。
pinyin: Zhè wèi yīshēng fēicháng jìngyè, hěn shòu zūnzhòng.
english: This doctor is very dedicated to his work and widely respected.

sentence: 他们两个说相声逗得全场大笑。
pinyin: Tāmen liǎng gè shuō xiàngsheng dòu de quánchǎng dà xiào.
english: The two of them performed a crosstalk routine that had the whole audience laughing.

sentence: 进门请换拖鞋。
pinyin: Jìn mén qǐng huàn tuōxié.
english: Please change into slippers when you come in.

sentence: 春天一到，燕子就回来了。
pinyin: Chūntiān yī dào, yànzi jiù huí lái le.
english: As soon as spring arrives, the swallows come back.

sentence: 全家人围坐在餐桌旁吃晚饭。
pinyin: Quánjiā rén wéi zuò zài cānzhuō páng chī wǎnfàn.
english: The whole family sat around the dining table for dinner.

sentence: 咖啡散发出浓郁的香气。
pinyin: Kā fēi sàn fā chū nóng yù de xiāng qì.
english: The coffee gives off a rich, strong aroma.

sentence: 他爬上梯子把坏掉的灯泡换掉了。
pinyin: Tā pá shàng tī zi bǎ huài diào de dēng pào huàn diào le.
english: He climbed up the ladder and replaced the broken light bulb.

sentence: 这个词的涵义比较复杂。
pinyin: Zhège cí de hányì bǐjiào fùzá.
english: The meaning of this word is fairly complex.

sentence: 青春期的孩子情绪变化比较大。
pinyin: Qīngchūnqī de háizi qíngxù biànhuà bǐjiào dà.
english: Children going through puberty tend to have bigger emotional swings.

meaning: 1. every time; 2. on each occasion; 3. whenever
sentence: 每逢过年，全家人都聚在一起吃饭。
pinyin: Měi féng guò nián, quán jiā rén dōu jù zài yī qǐ chī fàn.
english: Every time the New Year comes, the whole family gathers to eat together.

sentence: 图书馆内请勿大声喧哗。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn nèi qǐng wù dàshēng xuānhuá.
english: Please do not make loud noise inside the library.

sentence: 人工智能的兴起开启了新纪元。
pinyin: Réngōng zhìnéng de xīngqǐ kāiqǐ le xīn jìyuán.
english: The rise of artificial intelligence has opened a new era.

sentence: 她去做了整容，变化很大。
pinyin: Tā qù zuò le zhěngróng, biànhuà hěn dà.
english: She got plastic surgery and looks very different now.

sentence: 学校正在为贫困学生筹款。
pinyin: Xuéxiào zhèngzài wèi pínkùn xuésheng chóukuǎn.
english: The school is fundraising for students in need.

sentence: 手术后他出现了一些并发症。
pinyin: Shǒushù hòu tā chūxiàn le yīxiē bìngfāzhèng.
english: After the surgery he developed some complications.

sentence: 她特别喜欢印象派的绘画风格。
pinyin: Tā tèbié xǐhuān yìnxiàngpài de huìhuà fēnggé.
english: She particularly loves the painting style of Impressionism.

meaning: 1. to undertake to purchase sth; 2. to subscribe (to share issue)
sentence: 他认购了一百股新股。
pinyin: Tā rèngòu le yī bǎi gǔ xīn gǔ.
english: He subscribed to one hundred shares of the new stock issue.

meaning: 1. most recent in the past; 2. recent; 3. late; 4. recently
sentence: 晚近几年，智能手机的普及速度很快。
pinyin: Wǎnjìn jǐ nián, zhìnéng shǒujī de pǔjí sùdù hěn kuài.
english: In recent years, smartphones have spread very quickly.
